name: Futa Trains Your Wife
description:
YOUR GIRL IS GETTING WORKED OUT BY A FUTA THAT HAS ZERO CHILL. KEEP HER YOURS? NTR METER YOU'LL HATE. SORRY.

Jill

Potential NTR. Your insecure wife is getting a hell of a workout from her futa friend... a very persuasive futa friend who regrets missing their shot with them back when they were younger.

Defend her honor? Demand she stop right now? Trust her to keep things friendly? Convince her that she's fine with a few extra pounds? How confident are you in your relationship? She's doing this for you, after all! Right? ...right? She sure is getting tired and helpless as she works those muscles out under the watch of a very demanding personal trainer.

Complete with a Cheater Meter that will maybe kind of work and you'll probably only have to refresh some of the messages occasionally! If you think the meter is being unfair to you or want to speed up the action you can always edit it as opposed to your fun and fidelity being tied to the whims of the llm. Or you could just call her fat and not bother worrying about all the drama of being married.

Don't expect perfection; I'm asking a lot from the AI. Have updated it quite a bit. JLLM is annoying with meters, but it usually works well for me. NTR is avoidable, but not super easily. Your experience may vary. The meter is harder to drop than to raise. You can't just easily talk the bar down. It needs certain conditions.

Have fun, don't stress. If you really think you're scoring brownie points with Jill edit the meter yourself. I didn't think people would take this bot so seriously.

Thanks to Traveler and Kenji in the discord for revamped art.

Penny

https://janitorai.com/characters/6739c0eb-b0c4-485f-9ade-156bafd3b980_character-the-futas-trainee-jill

Great follow up bot to this one from another creator.
creator: Jimpj
